event.message: New instance of BPEL process "1.0" initiated (# "SendWOTChanges").

event.label: EncodeAndSetOpaquePayload
event.message: EncodeAndSetOpaquePayload (SewerAI payload; date mappings applied) started.

event.label: EncodeAndSetOpaquePayload
event.message: Opaque payload generated and Base64 encoded.

event.label: writeOpaque
event.message: Started invocation of operation "Write" on partner "ExportWOTUpdate_sp".

event.label: InvokePutProjects
event.message: Started invocation of operation "putProjects" on partner "SewerAIProjects".

event.label: InvokePutProjects
event.message: Faulted while invoking operation "putProjects" on provider "SewerAIProjects".

event.label: CapturePutProjectsFault
event.message: Error when evaulate expression: "bpws:getFaultAsString()". Fault is thrown.
event.details: 0An error occurs while processing the XPath expression; the expression is bpws:getFaultAsString()XPath expression failed to executeXPath expression failed to execute. An error occurs while processing the XPath expression; the expression is bpws:getFaultAsString(). The XPath expression failed to execute; the reason was: Function 'getFaultAsString' not found. Check the detailed root cause described in the exception message text and verify that the XPath query is correct.

event.label: InvokeProjectErrorStatusOnFault
event.message: Started invocation of operation "update" on partner "UpdateWOTSewerAIData".
